fields.name: Dhiraj Parajuli
fields.bio: Motivated BCA student with strong technical and problem-solving skills, building web platforms, mental health tools, and civic tech. Passionate about Python, Django, and modern web experiences.

fields.title: ServeSync
fields.description: A maid and house owner connection platform featuring real-time chat functionality and comprehensive user management system.

fields.title: MaanoSewa
fields.description: A mental health awareness web app developed for the Hackathon: Advancing Health in Nepal. Focused on accessibility and user wellbeing.

fields.title: Movie Ticket Booking
fields.description: A web-based booking system with secure user authentication, seat selection, and full booking management features.

fields.title: Bdhayalaya
fields.description: An education platform providing detailed college information, study materials, and resources to help students choose suitable courses and institutions.

fields.title: Freelance Frontend Developer & Designer
fields.description:
Designed and developed responsive websites using modern frontend tools
Created social media and banner creatives for various clients
Delivered end-to-end projects from design to deployment

fields.title: Regional Head — Techutsav 2.0

fields.description:
Co-organized a regional tech event collaborating with multiple companies and institutions
Led outreach and coordination across multiple stakeholders

fields.title: BCA Student
fields.description:

fields.title: Hackathon Participant

fields.title: Active Freelancer

fields.title: Strong Academic Record
